info.title: WhatsApp RPC API
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API over WebSocket for WhatsApp messaging

methods.name: restart
methods.summary: Full reset: logout, delete DB, clear QR cache, reinit, start fresh
methods.description: Performs a complete reset: 1) Logout from WhatsApp servers, 2) Shutdown service, 3) Delete device session, 4) Delete database files, 5) Clear QR cache, 6) Reinitialize client, 7) Start pairing

methods.name: reset
methods.summary: Reset WhatsApp session (logout and delete credentials)

methods.name: qr
methods.summary: Get current QR code for pairing

params.name: reply
params.description: Reply context for quoting a message

methods.name: media
methods.summary: Download media from a received message

methods.name: groups
methods.summary: List all groups the user is a member of
methods.description: Returns cached groups by default. Use refresh=true to fetch fresh data from WhatsApp (may trigger rate limits).

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache (default: false)

methods.name: group_info
methods.summary: Get detailed information about a specific group
methods.description: Returns cached group info by default. Use refresh=true to fetch fresh data from WhatsApp.

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache (default: false)

methods.name: contact_check
methods.summary: Check if phone numbers are registered on WhatsApp
methods.description: Returns cached results (24h TTL) by default. Use refresh=true to force fresh check from WhatsApp.

params.name: phones
params.description: Array of phone numbers to check (without + prefix)

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache (default: false)

methods.name: contact_profile_pic
methods.summary: Get profile picture for a user or group
methods.description: Returns cached result (24h TTL) by default. Use refresh=true to force fresh fetch from WhatsApp.

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache (default: false)

methods.name: contacts
methods.summary: List all contacts with saved names
methods.description: Returns contacts from the whatsmeow_contacts store with user-saved names

params.name: query
params.description: Optional search query to filter by name or phone number

push_name.description: WhatsApp profile name set by user

is_contact.description: Whether this is a saved contact

methods.name: contact_info
methods.summary: Get full information for a single contact
methods.description: Returns comprehensive contact info including name, business status, and profile picture URL

is_business.description: Whether this is a business account

methods.name: typing
methods.summary: Send typing indicator to a chat

params.name: media
params.description: Media type: '' for text, 'audio' for voice recording

params.name: message_ids
params.description: Array of message IDs to mark as read

params.name: chat_jid
params.description: Chat JID where messages are from

params.name: participants
params.description: Array of phone numbers or JIDs to add

params.name: participants
params.description: Array of phone numbers or JIDs to remove

methods.name: group_invite_link
methods.description: Returns cached invite link (1h TTL) by default. Use refresh=true to force fresh fetch from WhatsApp.

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache (default: false)

methods.name: group_revoke_invite
methods.summary: Revoke and regenerate group invite link

methods.name: rate_limit_get
methods.summary: Get rate limit configuration and statistics

params.name: link_extra_delay_ms
params.description: Extra delay for messages with links (milliseconds)

methods.name: rate_limit_stats
methods.summary: Get current rate limiting statistics only

methods.name: rate_limit_unpause
methods.summary: Resume rate limiting after automatic pause

methods.name: chat_history
methods.summary: Get chat history from stored messages
methods.description: Retrieve messages from SQLite history store. Messages are synced on first WhatsApp login and stored for later retrieval. Supports filtering by chat type (individual/group), sender, and message type.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Chat JID (e.g., 1234567890@s.whatsapp.net for individual, 123456789@g.us for group)

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number for individual chats (without +). Converted to JID automatically.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of messages to skip for pagination (default: 0)

params.name: sender_phone
params.description: Filter group messages by sender phone number

methods.name: newsletters
methods.description: Returns all channels the user is subscribed to. Results are cached for 24 hours; use refresh: true to force a fresh fetch from the WhatsApp API.

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache

methods.name: newsletter_info
methods.summary: Get channel details by JID or invite link
methods.description: Fetches detailed information about a single channel. Accepts either a newsletter JID or an invite link/code. Cached results returned unless refresh is true.

params.name: refresh
params.description: Force refresh from WhatsApp API instead of cache

params.name: mute
params.description: True to mute, false to unmute

params.name: before
params.description: Fetch messages before this server ID (for pagination)

methods.name: newsletter_send
methods.summary: Send a message to a channel (admin only)
methods.description: Sends a text or media message to a newsletter channel. Only channel admins/owners can send. Uses group_id field for the newsletter JID. Media is uploaded unencrypted via newsletter-specific upload.

params.name: type
params.description: Message type: text, image, video, document, audio

params.name: server_ids
params.description: Array of message server IDs to mark as viewed

params.name: server_id
params.description: Message server ID to react to

params.name: reaction
params.description: Reaction emoji (empty string to remove reaction)

methods.name: newsletter_live_updates
methods.summary: Subscribe to live updates for a channel (views/reactions)

methods.name: newsletter_stats
methods.description: Fetches channel metadata and recent messages, then aggregates statistics including total views, total reactions, averages per message, and top reactions. Always fetched fresh (not cached).

params.name: invite
params.description: Invite link or code for public channels

params.name: count
params.description: Number of recent messages to analyze (default: 20)

has_more.description: Whether more messages exist beyond limit+offset

is_group.description: Whether message is from a group chat

is_from_me.description: Whether message was sent by the connected device

message_id.description: ID of message to reply to

is_locked.description: Only admins can edit group info

is_community.description: Whether this is a community group

GroupParticipant.description: Group member with resolved phone number

phone.description: Real phone number (resolved from LID if needed)

GroupParticipantChangeResult.description: Result for a single participant change

NewsletterMessageInfo.description: A message in a WhatsApp channel

reaction_counts.description: Map of emoji to reaction count

NewsletterStats.description: Aggregated statistics for a WhatsApp channel

RateLimitConfig.description: Rate limiting configuration for anti-ban protection

link_extra_delay_ms.description: Extra delay for messages with links (ms)

event.status.description: Initial status sent on WebSocket connection

event.qr_code.description: New QR code available for pairing

chat_id.description: Chat JID (same as sender for DMs, group JID for groups)

forwarding_score.description: Number of times forwarded (higher = forwarded many times)

event.history_sync_complete.description: History sync completed after first login

event.newsletter_live_update.description: Live update with view/reaction counts for newsletter messages

contact.vcard:
BEGIN:VCARD
VERSION:3.0
FN:John Doe
TEL;type=CELL:+1234567890
END:VCARD

params.message: Hello subscribers! Welcome to our channel.

errorCodes.-32600: Invalid Request - Not a valid JSON-RPC 2.0 request
